title: Cherrypicking DNA and Pooling with CSV input
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol normalizes DNA transfers with diluent via a user imported .csv. Diluent is transferred to all relevent wells, and then DNA is premixed (from up to 3 source plates) and added to the diluent well, post-mixed, and pooled in H12 of the final plate. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `.CSV File`: : Here, you should upload a .csv file formatted in the following way, being sure to include the header line: ``` Sample number,Plate number, Source well, Destination well, Start Concentration (ug/uL) Source, Final Concentration (ug/ml) Destination, Sample volume (uL), Diluent Volume(ul), Total Volume(ul) Destination ``` NOTE: Plate number in the .csv file (column 2) should be either 1, 2, or 3, since the protocol can handle up to 3 source plates. * `Number of Source Plates`: Specify the number of source plate in this protocol. * `P20 Single-Channel Mount`: Specify which mount (left or right) to mount the Opentrons P20 Single Channel pipette. ---
steps_raw: This protocol normalizes DNA transfers with diluent via a user imported .csv. Diluent is transferred to all relevent wells, and then DNA is premixed (from up to 3 source plates) and added to the diluent well, post-mixed, and pooled in H12 of the final plate. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `.CSV File`: : Here, you should upload a .csv file formatted in the following way, being sure to include the header line: ``` Sample number,Plate number, Source well, Destination well, Start Concentration (ug/uL) Source, Final Concentration (ug/ml) Destination, Sample volume (uL), Diluent Volume(ul), Total Volume(ul) Destination ``` NOTE: Plate number in the .csv file (column 2) should be either 1, 2, or 3, since the protocol can handle up to 3 source plates. * `Number of Source Plates`: Specify the number of source plate in this protocol. * `P20 Single-Channel Mount`: Specify which mount (left or right) to mount the Opentrons P20 Single Channel pipette. ---
Transfer volume of diluent as per CSV (1 tip only needed) up to 3 source plates
Mix DNA and transfer from initial to the final plate (as per CSV), then mix after dispensing.
Pool 5ul of each sample into H12 of the final plate.
